flux_limiter_minmod.accuracy: O(dx^2) in smooth monotone regions; drops to O(dx) at extrema by design
flux_limiter_minmod.reference: Roe (1986), Ann. Rev. Fluid Mech. 18:337-365, eq. (35); Sweby (1984), SIAM J. Numer. Anal. 21(5):995-1011, fig. 3

sweby_bounds.comment: Sweby (1984) region: phi(r) >= 0 for all r, phi(r) = 0 for r <= 0, phi(r) <= min(2, 2*r) for r > 0, phi(1) = 1.

formula.comment: phi(r) = max(0, min(r, 1)) — the minmod limiter of Roe (1986).

flux_limiter_minmod.composition_hint: Caller computes slope ratio r = (q_i - q_{i-1}) / (q_{i+1} - q_i) at each interface and multiplies the high-order slope correction by phi(r). See discretizations/finite_volume/README.md for the worked example.
